Anthropic (Claude 模型).text: Last month we launched Project Glasswing, our collaborative AI cybersecurity initiative. Since then, we and our partners have found more than ten thousand high- or critical-severity vulnerabilities in essential software.

Patching these vulnerabilities will make us safer. But the software industry will need to adapt to the volume of vulnerabilities that models like Claude Mythos Preview will be able to find.

We discuss this in our initial update on Project Glasswing:
Anthropic (Claude 模型).summary: 软件行业需适应模型发现漏洞数量。

Runway (AI 视频).text: I've tried Aleph 2.0, and it's without a doubt the best video editor I've seen so far.

Yesterday we released Aleph 2.0, our upgraded video editing model that lets you change exactly what you want while keeping everything else the same. Available inside our new Edit Studio, you can work with multishot sequences up to 30 seconds long at 1080p.

Perplexity (AI 搜索引擎).text:
Today we're open-sourcing Bumblebee, a read-only scanner for macOS and Linux.

It checks developer machines for risky packages, extensions, and AI tool configs.

Connected to Computer, it can trigger deeper scans whenever a new supply-chain risk emerges.
